Title: TEXT INDEX
Feature: CREATE TEXT INDEX ON table_name (column_name) [WITH KEY key_column] [CLUSTERED WITH (cluster_columns)] USING function hook_proc
Description: Defines a free text index on a character or XML column so that CONTAINS and related predicates can do fast full-text search.
Virtuoso text indexes can be clustered with additional columns and extended using hook procedures that pre-process or augment the text being indexed.
